case_title: CRISTIAN MENDIETA VS. INTEGRITY WASTE INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MENDIETA, CRISTIAN AS TO DEFENDANT INTEGRITY WASTE INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MENDIETA, CRISTIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INTEGRITY WASTE INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPATION $12,381.56 PRINCIPAL, $858.60 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,610.16, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
